title: Home
text:
Welcome to my environmental data analytics portfolio. This site highlights selected R-based projects focused on water quality analysis, environmental data interpretation, and scientific visualization.




This project analyzes Virginia stream water quality data with a focus on nitrate concentrations. It includes data cleaning, descriptive statistics, ANOVA, chi-square analysis, and professional visualizations created in R.
View the project

title: about
text:
My name is Brandon Bishop, and I am building skills in environmental data analytics with a focus on water quality, environmental interpretation, and applied statistical analysis in R. My academic background is in environmental science, and my current work is focused on developing practical data analysis skills that can be applied to environmental datasets and real-world resource issues.
This portfolio highlights selected projects that demonstrate data cleaning, statistical analysis, visualization, and reproducible workflow organization. My interests include water quality, environmental monitoring, and using data to better understand environmental conditions and support decision-making.
